preamble: The shift from the front vowel [ɛ] to the back rounded vowel [o] involves both backing and rounding, often mediated by an intermediate [œ] stage or rounding influence.

examples.note: Limited cases where environmental factors cause backing/rounding in certain dialects.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
